title: Quantized Hall Conductance in a Two-Dimensional Periodic Potential
canonical_scope: Primary TKNN source for the quantized Hall conductance and the integer Chern invariant of filled bands.

section_map.title: Kubo Formula to Integer Hall Conductance
section_map.summary: The Hall conductance is rewritten as a Brillouin-zone integral whose value is an integer when the Fermi energy lies in a gap.
